description: Mobile travel-details Lighthouse performance budget (#816). Consumed by scripts/guard-lighthouse-mobile-budget.js against a machine-readable Lighthouse JSON report. Complements the byte-level guards (bundle-budget, eager-web) with runtime-metric regression checks (late LCP, high CLS, TBT, low score) so Sorapis-style regressions are caught.
throttlingNote: Produce the report with APPLIED throttling (--throttling-method=devtools). The simulate/lantern model inflates CLS attribution to the hero block and reports a phantom ~0.15 hero shift that does not occur on real throttled devices (#814). CLS/LCP must be measured applied, not simulated.
lcpNote: LCP on mobile is hydration/bundle-bound; the removable eager weight was already shipped (#764/#765) and the residual is irreducible framework runtime (RN-Web/expo-router/react-dom). The hard release gate for that floor is the byte budget (guard:bundle-budget, guard:eager-web). This LCP line is a regression tripwire + aspirational target tracked as a post-deploy gate, not a release blocker.
